description: Fahd Ananta discusses his journey from tech to trading, including experiences at Snapchat and Shopify, and insights into the crypto market and trading strategies.
topic_summary: Fahd Ananta shares his background in tech and trading, detailing his work at Snapchat during the pandemic [t=130.02], his transition to investing [t=100.8], and the challenges faced in the tech industry during chaotic times [t=194.32].
